The '''Nembus Sector campaign''' was a military campaign made by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to subjugate planets in the [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]], during the early years of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]].

==Background==
Early in the Imperial Period, the volatile [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]] was noted as being a hotbed for both Rebel and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] activity.<ref name="Valance1" />

==The campaign==
Some time before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] it was subjected to an major military campaign by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance's]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Legion/Legends|legion]] was assigned to the local [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Group]] which fought against those threats in the sector.<ref name="Valance1" /> The violence of the Galactic Civil War and notably the Nembus campaign had for consequences the increasing of the firepower of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. Although the rearming effort was sporadic in the galaxy, most of the [[Squad/Legends|squads]] involved in the Nembus Sector campaign were given a [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]].<ref name="ISb">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>

===Known battles===
*[[Pacification of Praadost II]]<ref name="Valance1" />

==Aftermath==
With the campaign dying down, Valance's legion was transferred to nearby [[Kwymar sector/Legends|Kwymar sector]], where it participated in the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]].<ref name="Valance1" />

==Behind the scenes==
A conflict in the [[Nembus sector/Legends|Nembus sector]] was first mentioned in the ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''. The Nembus Sector campaign was expanded in the miniature scenarios ''[[The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale]]'' by author [[Jason Fry]] who also named the campaign. A battle from ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' was [[Retroactive continuity|retcon]]ed as part of the campaign.<ref name="The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin5|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Conclusion}}</ref>
